from manim import *

class VectorAdditionScene(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        plane = NumberPlane(x_range=[-1, 5, 1], y_range=[-1, 4, 1]).add_coordinates()
        u = Arrow(ORIGIN, RIGHT * 3 + UP, buff=0, color=BLUE)
        v = Arrow(u.get_end(), u.get_end() + RIGHT + UP * 2, buff=0, color=YELLOW)
        total = Arrow(ORIGIN, RIGHT * 4 + UP * 3, buff=0, color=GREEN)
        labels = VGroup(
            MathTex("\\vec{u}").set_color(BLUE).next_to(u, UP),
            MathTex("\\vec{v}").set_color(YELLOW).next_to(v, RIGHT),
            MathTex("\\vec{u}+\\vec{v}").set_color(GREEN).next_to(total, RIGHT),
        )

        self.play(Create(plane))
        self.play(GrowArrow(u), FadeIn(labels[0]))
        self.play(GrowArrow(v), FadeIn(labels[1]))
        self.play(GrowArrow(total), FadeIn(labels[2]))
        self.wait(1)

from manim import *

class SinAndCosFunctionPlot(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        axes = Axes(
            x_range=[-10, 10.3, 1],
            y_range=[-1.5, 1.5, 1],
            x_length=10,
            axis_config={"color": GREEN},
            x_axis_config={
                "numbers_to_include": np.arange(-10, 10.01, 2),
                "numbers_with_elongated_ticks": np.arange(-10, 10.01, 2),
            },

        )

            sin_graph, "\\sin(x)", x_val=-10, direction=UP / 2

            cos_graph, r"x=2\pi", x_val=TAU, direction=UR, color=WHITE
        )

        plot = VGroup(axes, sin_graph, cos_graph, vert_line)
        labels = VGroup(axes_labels, sin_label, cos_label, line_label)
        self.add(plot, labels)

prompt: Create a Manim scene that plots a convex function, tracks a moving point on the curve with a ValueTracker, and marks the argmin with a dashed line and label.
completion:
from manim import *

class ArgMinExample(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        ax = Axes(
            x_range=[0, 10], y_range=[0, 100, 10], axis_config={"include_tip": False}
        )
        labels = ax.get_axis_labels(x_label="x", y_label="f(x)")

        t = ValueTracker(0)

        def func(x):
            return 2 * (x - 5) ** 2
        graph = ax.plot(func, color=MAROON)

        initial_point = [ax.coords_to_point(t.get_value(), func(t.get_value()))]
        dot = Dot(point=initial_point)

        dot.add_updater(lambda x: x.move_to(ax.c2p(t.get_value(), func(t.get_value()))))
        x_space = np.linspace(*ax.x_range[:2],200)
        minimum_index = func(x_space).argmin()

        self.add(ax, labels, graph, dot)
        self.play(t.animate.set_value(x_space[minimum_index]))
        self.wait()

from manim import *

class GraphAreaPlot(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        ax = Axes(
            x_range=[0, 5],
            y_range=[0, 6],
            x_axis_config={"numbers_to_include": [2, 3]},

from manim import *

class BooleanOperations(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        ellipse1 = Ellipse(
            width=4.0, height=5.0, fill_opacity=0.5, color=BLUE, stroke_width=10
        ).move_to(LEFT)
        ellipse2 = ellipse1.copy().set_color(color=RED).move_to(RIGHT)
        bool_ops_text = MarkupText("<u>Boolean Operation</u>").next_to(ellipse1, UP * 3)
        ellipse_group = Group(bool_ops_text, ellipse1, ellipse2).move_to(LEFT * 3)
        self.play(FadeIn(ellipse_group))

        i = Intersection(ellipse1, ellipse2, color=GREEN, fill_opacity=0.5)
        self.play(i.animate.scale(0.25).move_to(RIGHT * 5 + UP * 2.5))
        intersection_text = Text("Intersection", font_size=23).next_to(i, UP)
        self.play(FadeIn(intersection_text))

        u = Union(ellipse1, ellipse2, color=ORANGE, fill_opacity=0.5)
        union_text = Text("Union", font_size=23)
        self.play(u.animate.scale(0.3).next_to(i, DOWN, buff=union_text.height * 3))

prompt: Create a short Manim counting scene with a custom animation that updates a DecimalNumber from 0 to 100 while an updater keeps the number centered.
completion:
from manim import *

class Count(Animation):
    def __init__(self, number: DecimalNumber, start: float, end: float, **kwargs) -> None:
        # Pass number as the mobject of the animation
        super().__init__(number,  **kwargs)
        # Set start and end
        self.start = start
        self.end = end

    def interpolate_mobject(self, alpha: float) -> None:
        # Set value of DecimalNumber according to alpha
        value = self.start + (self.rate_func(alpha) * (self.end - self.start))
        self.mobject.set_value(value)


class CountingScene(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        # Create Decimal Number and add it to scene
        number = DecimalNumber().set_color(WHITE).scale(5)
        # Add an updater to keep the DecimalNumber centered as its value changes
        number.add_updater(lambda number: number.move_to(ORIGIN))

        self.add(number)

        self.wait()

        # Play the Count Animation to count from 0 to 100 in 4 seconds
        self.play(Count(number, 0, 100), run_time=4, rate_func=linear)

        self.wait()

from manim import *

class MobjectExample(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        p1 = [-1,-1, 0]
        p2 = [ 1,-1, 0]
        p3 = [ 1, 1, 0]
        p4 = [-1, 1, 0]
        a  = Line(p1,p2).append_points(Line(p2,p3).points).append_points(Line(p3,p4).points)
        point_start  = a.get_start()
        point_end    = a.get_end()
        point_center = a.get_center()
        self.add(Text(f"a.get_start() = {np.round(point_start,2).tolist()}", font_size=24).to_edge(UR).set_color(YELLOW))
        self.add(Text(f"a.get_end() = {np.round(point_end,2).tolist()}", font_size=24).next_to(self.mobjects[-1],DOWN).set_color(RED))
        self.add(Text(f"a.get_center() = {np.round(point_center,2).tolist()}", font_size=24).next_to(self.mobjects[-1],DOWN).set_color(BLUE))

        self.add(Dot(a.get_start()).set_color(YELLOW).scale(2))
        self.add(Dot(a.get_end()).set_color(RED).scale(2))
        self.add(Dot(a.get_top()).set_color(GREEN_A).scale(2))
        self.add(Dot(a.get_bottom()).set_color(GREEN_D).scale(2))
        self.add(Dot(a.get_center()).set_color(BLUE).scale(2))
        self.add(Dot(a.point_from_proportion(0.5)).set_color(ORANGE).scale(2))
        self.add(*[Dot(x) for x in a.points])
        self.add(a)

class ExampleRotation(Scene):

prompt: Create a short Manim scene that uses add_updater and remove_updater to rotate a line one way and then the other around the origin.
completion:
from manim import *

class RotationUpdater(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        def updater_forth(mobj, dt):
            mobj.rotate_about_origin(dt)
        def updater_back(mobj, dt):
            mobj.rotate_about_origin(-dt)
        line_reference = Line(ORIGIN, LEFT).set_color(WHITE)
        line_moving = Line(ORIGIN, LEFT).set_color(YELLOW)
        line_moving.add_updater(updater_forth)
        self.add(line_reference, line_moving)
        self.wait(2)
        line_moving.remove_updater(updater_forth)
        line_moving.add_updater(updater_back)
        self.wait(2)
        line_moving.remove_updater(updater_back)
        self.wait(0.5)

prompt: Create a short Manim scene with a moving dot that leaves a traced VMobject path behind it using an updater.
completion:
from manim import *

class PointWithTrace(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        path = VMobject()
        dot = Dot()
        path.set_points_as_corners([dot.get_center(), dot.get_center()])
        def update_path(path):
            previous_path = path.copy()
            previous_path.add_points_as_corners([dot.get_center()])
            path.become(previous_path)
        path.add_updater(update_path)
        self.add(path, dot)
        self.play(Rotating(dot, angle=PI, about_point=RIGHT, run_time=2))
        self.wait()
        self.play(dot.animate.shift(UP))
        self.play(dot.animate.shift(LEFT))
        self.wait()

prompt: Create a short Manim scene with a moving camera that zooms onto a dot and follows it as the dot moves along a sine graph.
completion:
from manim import *

class FollowingGraphCamera(MovingCameraScene):
    def construct(self):
        self.camera.frame.save_state()

        # create the axes and the curve
        ax = Axes(x_range=[-1, 10], y_range=[-1, 10])
        graph = ax.plot(lambda x: np.sin(x), color=BLUE, x_range=[0, 3 * PI])

        # create dots based on the graph
        moving_dot = Dot(ax.i2gp(graph.t_min, graph), color=ORANGE)
        dot_1 = Dot(ax.i2gp(graph.t_min, graph))
        dot_2 = Dot(ax.i2gp(graph.t_max, graph))

        self.add(ax, graph, dot_1, dot_2, moving_dot)
        self.play(self.camera.frame.animate.scale(0.5).move_to(moving_dot))

        def update_curve(mob):
            mob.move_to(moving_dot.get_center())

        self.camera.frame.add_updater(update_curve)
        self.play(MoveAlongPath(moving_dot, graph, rate_func=linear))
        self.camera.frame.remove_updater(update_curve)

        self.play(Restore(self.camera.frame))

prompt: Create a 10-second Manim scene that explains a small feed-forward neural network with three layers. Show nodes, connecting edges, and animate an activation pulse moving from the input layer to the output layer.
completion:
from manim import *

class FeedForwardSignalFlow(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        title = Text("Feed-Forward Network", font_size=36).to_edge(UP)
        layer_x = [-4, 0, 4]
        layer_sizes = [3, 4, 2]
        colors = [BLUE_E, TEAL_E, GREEN_E]
        layers = VGroup()
        for x_pos, size, color in zip(layer_x, layer_sizes, colors):
            dots = VGroup(*[
                Circle(radius=0.25, stroke_color=color, fill_color=color, fill_opacity=0.15)
                for _ in range(size)
            ]).arrange(DOWN, buff=0.55).move_to(np.array([x_pos, 0, 0]))
            layers.add(dots)
        edges = VGroup()
        for left_layer, right_layer in zip(layers[:-1], layers[1:]):
            for left_node in left_layer:
                for right_node in right_layer:
                    edges.add(Line(left_node.get_right(), right_node.get_left(), stroke_width=2, color=GRAY_B))
        labels = VGroup(
            Text("Input", font_size=24).next_to(layers[0], DOWN),
            Text("Hidden", font_size=24).next_to(layers[1], DOWN),
            Text("Output", font_size=24).next_to(layers[2], DOWN),
        )
        pulse_color = YELLOW
        pulses = VGroup(*[
            layer.copy().set_stroke(pulse_color, width=4).set_fill(pulse_color, opacity=0.25)
            for layer in layers
        ])
        self.play(FadeIn(title), LaggedStart(*[FadeIn(layer) for layer in layers], lag_ratio=0.2), Create(edges), FadeIn(labels), run_time=3)
        self.play(LaggedStart(*[Indicate(layer, color=pulse_color, scale_factor=1.05) for layer in layers], lag_ratio=0.45), run_time=4)
        self.play(FadeIn(pulses[0], scale=1.05), run_time=0.6)
        self.play(ReplacementTransform(pulses[0], pulses[1]), run_time=0.8)
        self.play(ReplacementTransform(pulses[1], pulses[2]), run_time=0.8)
        self.wait(1)

from manim import *

class CNNPipelineBlocks(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        title = Text("CNN Pipeline", font_size=38).to_edge(UP)
        image_grid = VGroup(*[
            Square(side_length=0.28, stroke_width=1, fill_opacity=0.45, fill_color=BLUE_B)
            for _ in range(16)
        ]).arrange_in_grid(4, 4, buff=0.03).move_to(LEFT * 5)
        conv1 = VGroup(*[
            Rectangle(width=1.0, height=1.8, stroke_color=TEAL_D, fill_color=TEAL_C, fill_opacity=0.2).shift(RIGHT * 0.12 * i + UP * 0.08 * i)
            for i in range(3)
        ]).move_to(LEFT * 1.8)
        pool = VGroup(*[
            Rectangle(width=0.8, height=1.2, stroke_color=GREEN_D, fill_color=GREEN_C, fill_opacity=0.2).shift(RIGHT * 0.1 * i + UP * 0.06 * i)
            for i in range(2)
        ]).move_to(RIGHT * 0.8)
        conv2 = VGroup(*[
            Rectangle(width=0.9, height=1.4, stroke_color=ORANGE, fill_color=ORANGE, fill_opacity=0.15).shift(RIGHT * 0.12 * i + UP * 0.08 * i)
            for i in range(3)
        ]).move_to(RIGHT * 3.1)
        classifier = RoundedRectangle(corner_radius=0.15, width=1.5, height=2.1, stroke_color=PURPLE, fill_color=PURPLE_E, fill_opacity=0.18).move_to(RIGHT * 5.5)
        classifier_label = Text("MLP", font_size=24).move_to(classifier)
        labels = VGroup(
            Text("Input", font_size=24).next_to(image_grid, DOWN),
            Text("Conv", font_size=24).next_to(conv1, DOWN),
            Text("Pool", font_size=24).next_to(pool, DOWN),
            Text("Conv", font_size=24).next_to(conv2, DOWN),
            Text("Classifier", font_size=24).next_to(classifier, DOWN),
        )
        arrows = VGroup(
            Arrow(image_grid.get_right(), conv1.get_left(), buff=0.2, color=GRAY_B),
            Arrow(conv1.get_right(), pool.get_left(), buff=0.2, color=GRAY_B),
            Arrow(pool.get_right(), conv2.get_left(), buff=0.2, color=GRAY_B),
            Arrow(conv2.get_right(), classifier.get_left(), buff=0.2, color=GRAY_B),
        )
        self.play(FadeIn(title), FadeIn(image_grid), FadeIn(labels[0]), run_time=2)
        self.play(GrowArrow(arrows[0]), FadeIn(conv1), FadeIn(labels[1]), run_time=2.5)

from manim import *

class BohrCarbonDiagram(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        title = Text("Carbon Bohr Model", font_size=36).to_edge(UP)
        nucleus = Circle(radius=0.55, stroke_color=RED_E, fill_color=RED_E, fill_opacity=0.35)
        nucleus_label = Text("C", font_size=30).move_to(nucleus)
        shell_inner = Circle(radius=1.35, color=BLUE_C)
        shell_outer = Circle(radius=2.35, color=TEAL_C)
        electrons = VGroup()
        for angle in [PI / 6, 7 * PI / 6]:
            electrons.add(Dot(shell_inner.point_at_angle(angle), radius=0.08, color=YELLOW))
        for angle in np.linspace(0, TAU, 4, endpoint=False):
            electrons.add(Dot(shell_outer.point_at_angle(angle + PI / 8), radius=0.08, color=YELLOW))
        shell_labels = VGroup(
            Text("1st shell", font_size=22, color=BLUE_C).next_to(shell_inner, RIGHT),
            Text("2nd shell", font_size=22, color=TEAL_C).next_to(shell_outer, LEFT),
        )
        self.play(FadeIn(title), FadeIn(nucleus), FadeIn(nucleus_label), run_time=2)
        self.play(Create(shell_inner), Create(shell_outer), run_time=2)
        self.play(LaggedStart(*[FadeIn(e) for e in electrons], lag_ratio=0.15), FadeIn(shell_labels), run_time=4)
        self.play(Indicate(nucleus, color=RED_A), Indicate(electrons, color=YELLOW_A), run_time=1)

from manim import *

class PeriodicTableHighlight(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        title = Text("Periodic Table Focus", font_size=36).to_edge(UP)
        cells = []
        data = [
            ("H", 0, 0), ("He", 17, 0),
            ("Li", 0, 1), ("Be", 1, 1), ("B", 12, 1), ("C", 13, 1), ("N", 14, 1), ("O", 15, 1), ("F", 16, 1), ("Ne", 17, 1),
            ("Na", 0, 2), ("Mg", 1, 2), ("Al", 12, 2), ("Si", 13, 2), ("P", 14, 2), ("S", 15, 2), ("Cl", 16, 2), ("Ar", 17, 2),
        ]
        for symbol, col, row in data:
            box = Square(side_length=0.48, stroke_width=1.5, color=GRAY_B)
            label = Text(symbol, font_size=16).move_to(box)
            group = VGroup(box, label).move_to(np.array([(col - 8.5) * 0.52, 1.5 - row * 0.55, 0]))
            cells.append(group)
        table = VGroup(*cells).shift(DOWN * 0.3)
        highlight_map = {"C": GREEN_B, "N": BLUE_B, "O": RED_B}
        highlights = VGroup(*[
            SurroundingRectangle(cell, color=highlight_map[cell[1].text], buff=0.03, stroke_width=3)
            for cell in table if cell[1].text in highlight_map
        ])
        note = VGroup(
            Text("C, N, O are central to many organic molecules.", font_size=24),
            Text("They combine often with hydrogen to build molecular structure.", font_size=22, color=GRAY_C),
        ).arrange(DOWN, aligned_edge=LEFT, buff=0.18).to_edge(DOWN)
        self.play(FadeIn(title), run_time=1.5)
        self.play(LaggedStart(*[FadeIn(cell) for cell in table], lag_ratio=0.04), run_time=6)
        self.play(LaggedStart(*[Create(highlight) for highlight in highlights], lag_ratio=0.4), run_time=4)
        self.play(FadeIn(note), run_time=3)
        self.play(*[Indicate(cell, color=highlight_map[cell[1].text]) for cell in table if cell[1].text in highlight_map], run_time=3)
        self.wait(2)

from manim import *

class ActivationComparisonPanel(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        title = Text("Activation Functions", font_size=36).to_edge(UP)
        axes_group = VGroup()
        specs = [
            ("ReLU", BLUE_D, lambda x: max(0, x)),
            ("Sigmoid", GREEN_D, lambda x: 1 / (1 + np.exp(-x))),
            ("tanh", ORANGE, lambda x: np.tanh(x)),
        ]
        for label, color, fn in specs:
            axes = Axes(
                x_range=[-3, 3, 1],
                y_range=[-1.2, 1.2, 1],
                x_length=2.9,
                y_length=2.2,
                tips=False,
                axis_config={"stroke_width": 2},
            )
            graph = axes.plot(fn, x_range=[-3, 3], color=color)
            title_label = Text(label, font_size=22, color=color).next_to(axes, UP, buff=0.2)
            axes_group.add(VGroup(axes, graph, title_label))
        axes_group.arrange(RIGHT, buff=0.65).shift(UP * 0.2)
        caption = Text("Nonlinear activations shape how networks learn patterns.", font_size=24, color=GRAY_C).to_edge(DOWN)
        self.play(FadeIn(title), LaggedStart(*[FadeIn(group[0], shift=UP * 0.2) for group in axes_group], lag_ratio=0.2), run_time=3)
        self.play(LaggedStart(*[Create(group[1]) for group in axes_group], lag_ratio=0.3), FadeIn(VGroup(*[group[2] for group in axes_group])), run_time=4)
        self.play(FadeIn(caption), run_time=2)
        self.wait(1)

from manim import *

class ResidualBlockFlow(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        title = Text("Residual Block", font_size=36).to_edge(UP)
        input_box = RoundedRectangle(corner_radius=0.15, width=1.3, height=0.8, color=BLUE_D, fill_opacity=0.15).shift(LEFT * 4)
        layer1 = RoundedRectangle(corner_radius=0.15, width=1.4, height=0.9, color=TEAL_D, fill_opacity=0.15).shift(LEFT * 1.3)
        layer2 = RoundedRectangle(corner_radius=0.15, width=1.4, height=0.9, color=TEAL_D, fill_opacity=0.15).shift(RIGHT * 1.3)
        add_circle = Circle(radius=0.32, color=YELLOW_D, fill_opacity=0.12).shift(RIGHT * 3.4)
        plus = MathTex("+").move_to(add_circle)
        output_box = RoundedRectangle(corner_radius=0.15, width=1.4, height=0.85, color=GREEN_D, fill_opacity=0.15).shift(RIGHT * 5.2)
        labels = VGroup(
            Text("Input", font_size=22).move_to(input_box),
            Text("Layer 1", font_size=22).move_to(layer1),
            Text("Layer 2", font_size=22).move_to(layer2),
            Text("Output", font_size=22).move_to(output_box),
        )
        arrows = VGroup(
            Arrow(input_box.get_right(), layer1.get_left(), buff=0.15, color=GRAY_B),
            Arrow(layer1.get_right(), layer2.get_left(), buff=0.15, color=GRAY_B),
            Arrow(layer2.get_right(), add_circle.get_left(), buff=0.1, color=GRAY_B),

        ])
        note = Text("Skip connections preserve information and stabilize deep models.", font_size=24, color=GRAY_C).to_edge(DOWN)
        self.play(FadeIn(title), FadeIn(input_box), FadeIn(labels[0]), run_time=2)
        self.play(LaggedStart(*[GrowArrow(arrow) for arrow in arrows], lag_ratio=0.2), FadeIn(layer1), FadeIn(layer2), FadeIn(add_circle), FadeIn(plus), FadeIn(output_box), FadeIn(labels[1:]), run_time=4)
        self.play(Create(skip), run_time=2)
        self.play(FadeIn(note), Indicate(skip, color=PURPLE_A), Indicate(add_circle, color=YELLOW_A), run_time=1)
        self.wait(1)

from manim import *

class LatentSpaceInterpolationPath(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        title = Text("Latent Space Interpolation", font_size=36).to_edge(UP)
        plane = NumberPlane(x_range=[-4, 4, 1], y_range=[-3, 3, 1], x_length=6.5, y_length=4.2, background_line_style={"stroke_opacity": 0.22}).shift(LEFT * 2.6)
        point_a = Dot(plane.c2p(-2.5, -1.2), color=BLUE_D, radius=0.09)
        point_b = Dot(plane.c2p(2.4, 1.4), color=GREEN_D, radius=0.09)
        label_a = Text("z1", font_size=24, color=BLUE_D).next_to(point_a, DOWN)
        label_b = Text("z2", font_size=24, color=GREEN_D).next_to(point_b, UP)
        path = CubicBezier(
            point_a.get_center(),
            plane.c2p(-1.0, 2.0),
            plane.c2p(1.2, -2.0),
            point_b.get_center(),
            color=YELLOW_D,
        )
        sample_cards = VGroup()
        colors = [BLUE_E, TEAL_E, GREEN_E, YELLOW_E]
        for i, color in enumerate(colors):
            card = RoundedRectangle(corner_radius=0.1, width=1.2, height=1.6, color=color, fill_opacity=0.12)
            bars = VGroup(*[
                Rectangle(width=0.16, height=0.25 + 0.18 * ((j + i) % 4), color=color, fill_opacity=0.65, stroke_width=0)
                for j in range(4)
            ]).arrange(RIGHT, buff=0.08)
            bars.move_to(card)
            sample_cards.add(VGroup(card, bars))
        sample_cards.arrange(RIGHT, buff=0.25).to_edge(RIGHT).shift(DOWN * 0.3)
        connector = Arrow(path.get_right(), sample_cards.get_left(), buff=0.2, color=GRAY_B)
        caption = Text("Smooth moves in latent space should produce smooth output changes.", font_size=24, color=GRAY_C).to_edge(DOWN)
        self.play(FadeIn(title), Create(plane), FadeIn(point_a), FadeIn(point_b), FadeIn(label_a), FadeIn(label_b), run_time=3)
        self.play(Create(path), run_time=3)
        self.play(MoveAlongPath(point_a.copy().set_color(YELLOW_A), path), run_time=3)
        self.play(GrowArrow(connector), LaggedStart(*[FadeIn(card) for card in sample_cards], lag_ratio=0.25), run_time=4)
        self.play(FadeIn(caption), Indicate(sample_cards, color=TEAL_A), run_time=3)
        self.wait(2)

from manim import *

class BenzeneRingLabels(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        title = Text("Benzene Ring", font_size=36).to_edge(UP)
        hexagon = RegularPolygon(n=6, radius=1.6, color=BLUE_D)
        carbon_labels = VGroup(*[
            Text("C", font_size=24).move_to(hexagon.point_from_proportion(i / 6) * 0.82)
            for i in range(6)
        ])
        bonds = VGroup()
        vertices = [hexagon.point_from_proportion(i / 6) for i in range(6)]
        for i in [0, 2, 4]:
            start = vertices[i]
            end = vertices[(i + 1) % 6]
            offset = 0.08 * normalize(rotate_vector(end - start, PI / 2))
            bonds.add(Line(start + offset, end + offset, color=YELLOW_D, stroke_width=4))
        hydrogen_labels = VGroup(*[
            Text("H", font_size=22, color=GRAY_C).move_to(vertex * 1.28)
            for vertex in vertices
        ])
        note = Text("Alternating bonds capture the familiar benzene motif.", font_size=24, color=GRAY_C).to_edge(DOWN)
        self.play(FadeIn(title), Create(hexagon), run_time=2)
        self.play(FadeIn(carbon_labels), FadeIn(hydrogen_labels), run_time=3)
        self.play(LaggedStart(*[Create(bond) for bond in bonds], lag_ratio=0.2), run_time=3)
        self.play(FadeIn(note), run_time=1)

from manim import *

class OrbitalPhaseRotation(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        title = Text("Orbital Phase and Orientation", font_size=34).to_edge(UP)
        left_orbital = VGroup(
            Ellipse(width=1.2, height=2.1, stroke_color=BLUE_D, fill_color=BLUE_C, fill_opacity=0.32).shift(UP * 1.1),
            Ellipse(width=1.2, height=2.1, stroke_color=RED_D, fill_color=RED_C, fill_opacity=0.32).shift(DOWN * 1.1),
            DashedLine(LEFT * 1.6, RIGHT * 1.6, color=GRAY_C),
        ).move_to(LEFT * 3.1)
        right_orbital = left_orbital.copy().rotate(PI / 2).move_to(RIGHT * 3.1)
        left_label = Text("vertical orientation", font_size=22).next_to(left_orbital, DOWN)
        right_label = Text("horizontal orientation", font_size=22).next_to(right_orbital, DOWN)
        plus_minus = VGroup(
            MathTex("+", color=BLUE_D).move_to(left_orbital[0]),
            MathTex("-", color=RED_D).move_to(left_orbital[1]),
            MathTex("+", color=BLUE_D).move_to(right_orbital[0]),
            MathTex("-", color=RED_D).move_to(right_orbital[1]),
        )
        arrow = CurvedArrow(left_orbital.get_right() + RIGHT * 0.2, right_orbital.get_left() + LEFT * 0.2, angle=-PI / 2, color=YELLOW_D)
        caption = VGroup(
            Text("The sign pattern stays paired to the lobe orientation.", font_size=24),

        ).arrange(DOWN, buff=0.16).to_edge(DOWN)

        self.play(Create(arrow), TransformFromCopy(left_orbital, right_orbital), FadeIn(right_label), FadeIn(plus_minus[2:]), run_time=5)
        self.play(Rotate(right_orbital, angle=PI / 2), plus_minus[2:].animate.rotate(PI / 2, about_point=right_orbital.get_center()), run_time=4)

from manim import *

class AttentionHeatmapFocus(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        title = Text("Attention Heatmap", font_size=36).to_edge(UP)
        values = [
            [0.20, 0.55, 0.15, 0.10],
            [0.10, 0.20, 0.55, 0.15],
            [0.08, 0.12, 0.30, 0.50],
            [0.45, 0.22, 0.18, 0.15],
        ]
        cells = VGroup()
        for row in values:
            row_group = VGroup()
            for value in row:
                square = Square(side_length=0.78, color=BLUE_D, fill_color=BLUE_C, fill_opacity=0.15 + 0.7 * value)
                text = DecimalNumber(value, num_decimal_places=2, font_size=20).move_to(square)
                row_group.add(VGroup(square, text))
            row_group.arrange(RIGHT, buff=0.05)
            cells.add(row_group)
        cells.arrange(DOWN, buff=0.05).shift(LEFT * 0.4)
        query_labels = VGroup(*[Text(f"q{i + 1}", font_size=22).next_to(cells[i], LEFT, buff=0.25) for i in range(4)])
        key_labels = VGroup(*[Text(f"k{i + 1}", font_size=22).next_to(cells[0][i], UP, buff=0.2) for i in range(4)])
        row_box = SurroundingRectangle(cells[2], color=YELLOW_D, buff=0.08)
        focus_box = SurroundingRectangle(VGroup(cells[2][2], cells[2][3]), color=GREEN_D, buff=0.08)
        caption = Text("One query can place most of its weight on a few relevant keys.", font_size=24, color=GRAY_C).to_edge(DOWN)
        self.play(FadeIn(title), FadeIn(cells), FadeIn(query_labels), FadeIn(key_labels), run_time=3)
        self.play(Create(row_box), run_time=2)

from manim import *

class EmbeddingClusterMap(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        title = Text("Embedding Space", font_size=36).to_edge(UP)
        plane = NumberPlane(x_range=[-5, 5, 1], y_range=[-3, 3, 1], x_length=8, y_length=4.8, background_line_style={"stroke_opacity": 0.2}).shift(DOWN * 0.1)
        centers = [LEFT * 2.8 + UP * 0.8, RIGHT * 0.1 + DOWN * 0.2, RIGHT * 3.0 + UP * 1.0]
        colors = [BLUE_D, GREEN_D, ORANGE]
        names = ["animals", "tools", "cities"]
        clusters = VGroup()
        labels = VGroup()
        prototypes = VGroup()
        offsets = [
            [LEFT * 0.4, RIGHT * 0.35 + UP * 0.22, DOWN * 0.35, LEFT * 0.15 + DOWN * 0.22],
            [LEFT * 0.28 + UP * 0.2, RIGHT * 0.33, DOWN * 0.32, RIGHT * 0.18 + UP * 0.35],
            [LEFT * 0.3, RIGHT * 0.36 + DOWN * 0.16, UP * 0.35, LEFT * 0.18 + DOWN * 0.32],
        ]
        for center, color, name, local_offsets in zip(centers, colors, names, offsets):
            dots = VGroup(*[Dot(center + offset, color=color, radius=0.07) for offset in local_offsets])
            proto = Star(color=YELLOW_D, fill_color=YELLOW_E, fill_opacity=0.8, outer_radius=0.12).move_to(center)
            label = Text(name, font_size=24, color=color).next_to(dots, UP)

        self.play(FadeIn(title), Create(plane), run_time=3)
        self.play(LaggedStart(*[FadeIn(group) for group in clusters], lag_ratio=0.25), run_time=4)
        self.play(LaggedStart(*[FadeIn(proto) for proto in prototypes], lag_ratio=0.25), FadeIn(labels), run_time=4)

        self.play(FadeIn(caption), run_time=3)
        self.wait(2)

from manim import *

class ReactionCoordinateCurve(Scene):

        title = Text("Reaction Coordinate", font_size=36).to_edge(UP)
        axes = Axes(x_range=[0, 10, 1], y_range=[0, 6, 1], x_length=7.5, y_length=4.5, tips=False).shift(DOWN * 0.2)
        axis_labels = axes.get_axis_labels(Text("reaction progress", font_size=22), Text("energy", font_size=22))

        self.play(Create(curve), run_time=3)

        self.play(Create(barrier), FadeIn(barrier_label), run_time=3)

from manim import *

class SuccessionPipelineToken(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        title = Text("Succession Plays One Animation After Another", font_size=34).to_edge(UP)
        stages = VGroup(*[
            VGroup(
                RoundedRectangle(corner_radius=0.1, width=1.8, height=0.85, color=TEAL_D, fill_opacity=0.12),
                Text(label, font_size=22, color=TEAL_D),
            )
            for label in ["parse", "plan", "animate"]
        ]).arrange(RIGHT, buff=1.0).shift(UP * 0.2)
        for group in stages:
            group[1].move_to(group[0])
        token = Dot(color=YELLOW, radius=0.1).move_to(stages[0][0].get_left() + RIGHT * 0.3)
        paths = [
            Line(token.get_center(), stages[0][0].get_center()),
            Line(stages[0][0].get_center(), stages[1][0].get_center()),
            Line(stages[1][0].get_center(), stages[2][0].get_center()),
        ]
        connectors = VGroup(*[Arrow(stages[i][0].get_right(), stages[i + 1][0].get_left(), buff=0.15, color=GRAY_B) for i in range(2)])
        caption = Text("Succession is useful when the order itself is the story.", font_size=24, color=GRAY_D).to_edge(DOWN)

        self.play(FadeIn(title), FadeIn(stages), FadeIn(connectors), FadeIn(token), run_time=3)
        self.play(
            Succession(
                MoveAlongPath(token, paths[0], rate_func=linear),
                Indicate(stages[0][0], color=YELLOW_D),
                MoveAlongPath(token, paths[1], rate_func=linear),
                Indicate(stages[1][0], color=YELLOW_D),
                MoveAlongPath(token, paths[2], rate_func=linear),
                Indicate(stages[2][0], color=YELLOW_D),
            ),
            FadeIn(caption),
            run_time=5,
        )
        self.wait(2)

class ZoomedPixelFocus(ZoomedScene):
    def __init__(self, **kwargs):
        super().__init__(
            zoom_factor=0.35,
            zoomed_display_height=2.2,
            zoomed_display_width=4.2,
            image_frame_stroke_width=12,
            zoomed_camera_config={"default_frame_stroke_width": 3},
            **kwargs,
        )

    def construct(self):
        title = Text("ZoomedScene Is Useful for Tiny Motion Details", font_size=32).to_edge(UP)
        image = ImageMobject(np.uint8([
            [[15, 25, 120, 255], [30, 60, 160, 255], [180, 80, 40, 255], [230, 210, 60, 255]],
            [[40, 100, 180, 255], [60, 150, 210, 255], [210, 110, 70, 255], [240, 220, 110, 255]],
            [[80, 140, 70, 255], [100, 200, 100, 255], [220, 170, 90, 255], [250, 235, 150, 255]],
            [[120, 170, 90, 255], [150, 220, 140, 255], [235, 205, 120, 255], [255, 245, 180, 255]],
        ])).scale(1.6)
        focus = SurroundingRectangle(image, color=GRAY_C, buff=0.02)
        target_dot = Dot(image.get_center() + RIGHT * 0.55 + DOWN * 0.55, color=YELLOW, radius=0.05)
        frame = self.zoomed_camera.frame

        display.display_frame.set_color(RED_D)

        self.play(FadeIn(title), FadeIn(image), Create(focus), FadeIn(target_dot), run_time=3)
        self.play(Create(frame), run_time=2)
        self.activate_zooming()
        self.play(self.get_zoomed_display_pop_out_animation(), run_time=3)
        self.play(frame.animate.shift(LEFT * 0.8 + UP * 0.8), run_time=3)
        self.play(display.animate.scale(1.2), FadeIn(caption), run_time=3)
        self.play(self.get_zoomed_display_pop_out_animation(), rate_func=lambda t: smooth(1 - t), run_time=3)

class ProbabilityNumberLineMasses(Scene):

        self.play(LaggedStart(*[Create(stem) for stem in stems], lag_ratio=0.15), LaggedStart(*[FadeIn(dot) for dot in dots], lag_ratio=0.15), LaggedStart(*[FadeIn(label) for label in labels], lag_ratio=0.15), FadeIn(caption), run_time=4)

from manim import *

class RiemannSumRefinementDashboard(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        def curve(x):
            return 0.18 * x**2 + 0.35 * x + 0.8

        title = Text("Refining a Riemann Sum", font_size=38).to_edge(UP)
        axes = Axes(
            x_range=[0, 4, 1],
            y_range=[0, 5, 1],
            x_length=8,
            y_length=4.5,
            tips=False,
        ).shift(DOWN * 0.25)
        graph = axes.plot(curve, x_range=[0, 4], color=BLUE_D)
        n_tracker = ValueTracker(4)
        rectangles = always_redraw(
            lambda: axes.get_riemann_rectangles(
                graph,
                x_range=[0, 4],
                dx=4 / int(n_tracker.get_value()),
                input_sample_type="right",
                color=[TEAL_D, BLUE_D],
                fill_opacity=0.7,
                stroke_width=0.4,
            )

            ).arrange(RIGHT, buff=0.2).to_corner(UR).shift(DOWN * 0.6)
        )
        caption = Text("More slices hug the curve more closely.", font_size=28, color=GRAY_D).to_edge(DOWN)

        self.play(FadeIn(title), Create(axes), Create(graph), run_time=4)
        self.play(FadeIn(rectangles), FadeIn(count_panel), run_time=3)
        self.play(n_tracker.animate.set_value(8), run_time=4)

from manim import *

class MatrixTransformPathEcho(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        title = Text("A Matrix Moves Every Point Together", font_size=36).to_edge(UP)
        plane = NumberPlane(x_range=[-5, 5, 1], y_range=[-4, 4, 1], background_line_style={"stroke_opacity": 0.35})
        shape = Polygon(LEFT + DOWN, LEFT + UP, RIGHT * 0.6 + UP * 0.4, RIGHT + DOWN * 0.8, color=TEAL_D, fill_opacity=0.18).shift(LEFT * 1.2)
        probe = Dot(shape.get_vertices()[0], color=YELLOW, radius=0.08)
        path = TracedPath(probe.get_center, stroke_color=YELLOW_D, stroke_width=4)
        vector_arrow = always_redraw(lambda: Arrow(ORIGIN, probe.get_center(), buff=0.0, color=YELLOW_D, stroke_width=5, max_tip_length_to_length_ratio=0.18))
        matrix_tex = MathTex(r"A = \begin{bmatrix}1.2 & 0.5\\-0.2 & 1.1\end{bmatrix}", color=BLUE_D).to_corner(UR).shift(DOWN * 0.5)
        caption_a = Text("The matrix changes the whole shape in one step.", font_size=26, color=GRAY_D).to_edge(DOWN)
        caption_b = Text("Tracing one corner makes the transformation easier to read.", font_size=26, color=GRAY_D).to_edge(DOWN)
        group = VGroup(shape, probe)

        self.play(FadeIn(title), Create(plane), FadeIn(shape), FadeIn(matrix_tex), run_time=4)
        self.add(path, vector_arrow)
        self.play(FadeIn(caption_a), run_time=2)
        self.play(ApplyMatrix([[1.2, 0.5], [-0.2, 1.1]], group), run_time=5)
        self.play(ReplacementTransform(caption_a, caption_b), run_time=2)
        self.play(ApplyMatrix([[0.9, -0.3], [0.25, 1.05]], group), run_time=5)
        self.wait(2)

from manim import *

class VectorFieldParticlesCompare(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        def field_fn(point):
            return np.array([0.5 - 0.2 * point[1], 0.25 * point[0] + 0.15, 0.0])

        title = Text("Local Arrows Predict Motion", font_size=38).to_edge(UP)
        plane = NumberPlane(x_range=[-5, 5, 1], y_range=[-3, 3, 1], background_line_style={"stroke_opacity": 0.32}).shift(DOWN * 0.2)
        field = ArrowVectorField(field_fn, x_range=[-5, 5, 1], y_range=[-3, 3, 1], colors=[BLUE_E, TEAL_D, YELLOW_D], length_func=lambda norm: 0.16 + 0.14 * min(norm, 2.2))

        starts = [plane.c2p(-3.8, -1.8), plane.c2p(-3.2, 0.0), plane.c2p(-2.7, 1.6)]
        colors = [YELLOW_D, RED_D, PURPLE_D]
        probes = VGroup(*[Dot(point, color=color, radius=0.08) for point, color in zip(starts, colors)])
        traces = VGroup(*[TracedPath(dot.get_center, stroke_color=color, stroke_width=4) for dot, color in zip(probes, colors)])
        paths = [
            VMobject(color=colors[0]).set_points_smoothly([plane.c2p(-3.8, -1.8), plane.c2p(-2.2, -0.7), plane.c2p(-0.4, 0.8), plane.c2p(1.9, 1.0)]),
            VMobject(color=colors[1]).set_points_smoothly([plane.c2p(-3.2, 0.0), plane.c2p(-1.4, 0.4), plane.c2p(0.7, 1.4), plane.c2p(2.6, 0.5)]),
            VMobject(color=colors[2]).set_points_smoothly([plane.c2p(-2.7, 1.6), plane.c2p(-1.1, 1.7), plane.c2p(1.0, 1.1), plane.c2p(3.0, -0.3)]),
        ]
        caption_a = Text("The vector field sets the local direction at each point.", font_size=27, color=GRAY_D).to_edge(DOWN)
        caption_b = Text("Different starting points generate different trajectories.", font_size=27, color=GRAY_D).to_edge(DOWN)

        self.play(FadeIn(title), Create(plane), FadeIn(field), run_time=4)
        self.add(*traces)
        self.play(LaggedStart(*[FadeIn(dot) for dot in probes], lag_ratio=0.18), FadeIn(caption_a), run_time=3)
        self.play(LaggedStart(*[MoveAlongPath(dot, path, rate_func=linear, run_time=8) for dot, path in zip(probes, paths)], lag_ratio=0.1), ReplacementTransform(caption_a, caption_b), run_time=10)
        self.wait(2)

from manim import *

class ComplexPlaneRotationStory(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        title = Text("Multiplying by i Rotates the Point", font_size=34).to_edge(UP)
        plane = ComplexPlane(x_range=[-3, 3, 1], y_range=[-3, 3, 1]).add_coordinates().shift(DOWN * 0.2)
        origin = plane.n2p(0)
        dot = Dot(plane.n2p(1 + 1j), color=YELLOW, radius=0.08)
        arrow = always_redraw(lambda: Arrow(origin, dot.get_center(), buff=0.0, color=YELLOW_D, stroke_width=5, max_tip_length_to_length_ratio=0.18))
        path = TracedPath(dot.get_center, stroke_color=YELLOW_D, stroke_width=4)
        label = MathTex("z", color=YELLOW_D).next_to(dot, UR, buff=0.15)
        next_label = MathTex("iz", color=BLUE_D)
        final_label = MathTex("-z", color=RED_D)
        circle = Circle(radius=np.linalg.norm(plane.n2p(1 + 1j) - origin), color=GRAY_C, stroke_opacity=0.4).move_to(origin)

        self.play(FadeIn(title), Create(plane), Create(circle), FadeIn(dot), FadeIn(label), run_time=3)
        self.add(path, arrow)
        self.play(Rotate(dot, angle=PI / 2, about_point=origin), run_time=2)
        next_label.next_to(dot, UR, buff=0.15)
        self.play(Transform(label, next_label), run_time=1)
        self.play(Rotate(dot, angle=PI / 2, about_point=origin), run_time=2)
        final_label.next_to(dot, UL, buff=0.15)
        self.play(Transform(label, final_label), run_time=1)
        self.wait(1)

from manim import *

class TitrationTrackerDashboard(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        def ph_curve(x):
            return 2.2 + 9.0 / (1 + np.exp(-(x - 5.2) * 1.8))

        title = Text("Reading a Titration Curve", font_size=38).to_edge(UP)
        axes = Axes(
            x_range=[0, 10, 1],
            y_range=[0, 14, 2],
            x_length=8.4,
            y_length=4.8,
            tips=False,
            axis_config={"include_numbers": True},
        ).shift(DOWN * 0.25)
        graph = axes.plot(ph_curve, x_range=[0.2, 9.8], color=GREEN_D)
        x_tracker = ValueTracker(1.2)
        dot = always_redraw(lambda: Dot(axes.c2p(x_tracker.get_value(), ph_curve(x_tracker.get_value())), color=YELLOW, radius=0.08))
        guides = always_redraw(
            lambda: VGroup(
                DashedLine(axes.c2p(x_tracker.get_value(), 0), dot.get_center(), color=GRAY_B),
                DashedLine(axes.c2p(0, ph_curve(x_tracker.get_value())), dot.get_center(), color=GRAY_B),
            )
        )
        readout = always_redraw(
            lambda: VGroup(
                Text("pH", font_size=24, color=GRAY_D),
                DecimalNumber(ph_curve(x_tracker.get_value()), num_decimal_places=2, font_size=28, color=YELLOW_D),
            ).arrange(RIGHT, buff=0.18).to_corner(UR).shift(DOWN * 0.6)
        )
        acidic = Text("acidic region", font_size=24, color=BLUE_D).next_to(axes.c2p(1.5, 3.0), LEFT)
        eq_box = SurroundingRectangle(Text("equivalence", font_size=22).move_to(axes.c2p(5.3, 8.2)), color=GREEN_E, buff=0.12)
        eq_text = Text("equivalence", font_size=22, color=GREEN_E).move_to(eq_box)
        basic = Text("basic region", font_size=24, color=PURPLE_D).next_to(axes.c2p(8.5, 11.6), RIGHT)
        caption = Text("The steep middle section marks the rapid pH jump.", font_size=27, color=GRAY_D).to_edge(DOWN)

        self.play(FadeIn(title), Create(axes), Create(graph), run_time=4)
        self.play(FadeIn(dot), FadeIn(guides), FadeIn(readout), FadeIn(acidic), run_time=3)
        self.play(x_tracker.animate.set_value(5.2), run_time=6)
        self.play(FadeIn(eq_box), FadeIn(eq_text), run_time=3)
        self.play(x_tracker.animate.set_value(8.8), FadeIn(basic), FadeIn(caption), run_time=6)
        self.wait(2)

prompt: Create a 30-second Manim explainer showing how a square-wave approximation is built from odd sine terms. Show the first term, then the first two odd terms, then the first three odd terms, and compare the final approximation to a square-wave reference.
completion:
from manim import *

class FourierSeriesBuild(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        title = Text("Building a Square Wave", font_size=40).to_edge(UP)
        axes = Axes(
            x_range=[-PI, PI, PI / 2],
            y_range=[-1.6, 1.6, 0.5],
            x_length=9,
            y_length=4.5,
            axis_config={"include_numbers": False},
            tips=False,
        ).shift(DOWN * 0.4)
        labels = axes.get_axis_labels(MathTex("x"), MathTex("f(x)"))

        first = axes.plot(lambda x: (4 / PI) * np.sin(x), color=BLUE)
        second = axes.plot(
            lambda x: (4 / PI) * (np.sin(x) + np.sin(3 * x) / 3),
            color=GREEN,
        )
        third = axes.plot(
            lambda x: (4 / PI) * (np.sin(x) + np.sin(3 * x) / 3 + np.sin(5 * x) / 5),
            color=YELLOW,
        )
        square_ref = axes.plot(
            lambda x: 1 if x >= 0 else -1,
            x_range=[-PI, PI, 0.02],
            color=RED,
            use_smoothing=False,
        )

        eq1 = MathTex(r"\frac{4}{\pi}\sin(x)", color=BLUE).next_to(axes, DOWN, buff=0.5)
        eq2 = MathTex(r"\frac{4}{\pi}\left(\sin(x)+\frac{1}{3}\sin(3x)\right)", color=GREEN).next_to(axes, DOWN, buff=0.5)
        eq3 = MathTex(r"\frac{4}{\pi}\left(\sin(x)+\frac{1}{3}\sin(3x)+\frac{1}{5}\sin(5x)\right)", color=YELLOW).scale(0.9).next_to(axes, DOWN, buff=0.5)
        ref_label = Text("Target square wave", font_size=26, color=RED).next_to(axes, RIGHT)
        insight = Text("More odd terms sharpen the jump", font_size=28, color=GRAY_D).to_edge(DOWN)

        self.play(FadeIn(title), Create(axes), FadeIn(labels), run_time=3)
        self.play(Create(first), FadeIn(eq1), run_time=4)
        self.wait(1)
        self.play(ReplacementTransform(first, second), ReplacementTransform(eq1, eq2), run_time=5)
        self.wait(1)
        self.play(ReplacementTransform(second, third), ReplacementTransform(eq2, eq3), run_time=5)
        self.wait(1)
        self.play(Create(square_ref), FadeIn(ref_label), run_time=4)
        self.play(FadeIn(insight), run_time=2)
        self.wait(2)

from manim import *

class AttentionHeatmapWalkthrough(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        title = Text("Attention as Weighted Focus", font_size=40).to_edge(UP)
        token_labels = ["The", "robot", "solves", "tasks"]
        tokens = VGroup(*[
            VGroup(
                RoundedRectangle(corner_radius=0.12, width=1.35, height=0.6, color=BLUE_D, fill_opacity=0.12),
                Text(word, font_size=24),
            )
            for word in token_labels
        ]).arrange(RIGHT, buff=0.25).shift(UP * 2.1)
        for group in tokens:
            group[1].move_to(group[0])

        values = [0.15, 0.70, 0.45, 0.30, 0.25, 0.55, 0.80, 0.35, 0.10, 0.40, 0.75, 0.50, 0.20, 0.65, 0.30, 0.90]
        cells = VGroup()
        for idx, value in enumerate(values):
            square = Square(side_length=0.55, stroke_color=GRAY_B, fill_color=ORANGE, fill_opacity=value)
            square.add(Text(f"{value:.2f}", font_size=16).move_to(square))
            cells.add(square)
        heatmap = cells.arrange_in_grid(rows=4, cols=4, buff=0.03).shift(LEFT * 2.3 + DOWN * 0.3)
        row_highlight = SurroundingRectangle(heatmap[4:8], color=YELLOW, buff=0.08)
        query_box = SurroundingRectangle(tokens[1], color=YELLOW, buff=0.12)

        value_vectors = VGroup(*[
            VGroup(
                Rectangle(width=0.45, height=1.6, color=TEAL_D, fill_opacity=0.18),
                Text(label, font_size=20).rotate(PI / 2),
            )
            for label in ["v1", "v2", "v3", "v4"]
        ]).arrange(RIGHT, buff=0.15).shift(RIGHT * 3.5 + DOWN * 0.1)
        for group in value_vectors:
            group[1].move_to(group[0])
        output_box = RoundedRectangle(corner_radius=0.1, width=1.5, height=0.8, color=GREEN_D, fill_opacity=0.16).shift(RIGHT * 3.6 + DOWN * 2.0)
        output_label = Text("mixed output", font_size=22, color=GREEN_D).move_to(output_box)

        arrows = VGroup(*[
            Arrow(row_highlight.get_right(), box.get_left(), buff=0.12, stroke_width=4, color=YELLOW_D)
            for box in value_vectors
        ])
        combine_arrow = Arrow(value_vectors.get_bottom(), output_box.get_top(), buff=0.2, color=GREEN_D, stroke_width=5)
        caption = Text("The selected row says which values matter most", font_size=28, color=GRAY_D).to_edge(DOWN)

        self.play(FadeIn(title), LaggedStart(*[FadeIn(group) for group in tokens], lag_ratio=0.15), run_time=4)
        self.play(Create(query_box), run_time=2)
        self.play(LaggedStart(*[FadeIn(cell) for cell in heatmap], lag_ratio=0.05), run_time=4)
        self.play(Create(row_highlight), run_time=2)
        self.play(LaggedStart(*[FadeIn(group) for group in value_vectors], lag_ratio=0.12), run_time=3)
        self.play(LaggedStart(*[GrowArrow(arrow) for arrow in arrows], lag_ratio=0.12), run_time=4)
        self.play(GrowArrow(combine_arrow), FadeIn(output_box), FadeIn(output_label), run_time=3)
        self.play(FadeIn(caption), run_time=2)
        self.wait(2)

from manim import *

class BFSWavefrontLayers(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        title = Text("Breadth-First Search as Layers", font_size=40).to_edge(UP)
        positions = {
            "A": LEFT * 4 + UP * 1.8,
            "B": LEFT * 2 + UP * 2.7,
            "C": LEFT * 2 + UP * 0.9,
            "D": ORIGIN + UP * 2.1,
            "E": ORIGIN + DOWN * 0.2,
            "F": RIGHT * 2 + UP * 2.6,
            "G": RIGHT * 2 + UP * 0.6,
            "H": RIGHT * 4 + UP * 1.6,
        }
        edges = [("A", "B"), ("A", "C"), ("B", "D"), ("C", "D"), ("C", "E"), ("D", "F"), ("E", "G"), ("F", "H"), ("G", "H")]

        edge_group = VGroup(*[
            Line(positions[left], positions[right], color=GRAY_C, stroke_width=4)
            for left, right in edges
        ])
        node_group = VGroup()
        rings = {}
        for name, point in positions.items():
            dot = Dot(point, radius=0.14, color=BLUE_D)
            label = Text(name, font_size=24).next_to(dot, DOWN, buff=0.15)
            node_group.add(VGroup(dot, label))
            rings[name] = Circle(radius=0.34, color=BLUE_E).move_to(dot)

        layer_map = {
            0: ["A"],
            1: ["B", "C"],
            2: ["D", "E"],
            3: ["F", "G"],
            4: ["H"],
        }
        layer_colors = [YELLOW_D, GREEN_D, TEAL_D, ORANGE, RED_D]
        captions = [
            Text("Start from the source node", font_size=28, color=layer_colors[0]),
            Text("Visit all immediate neighbors", font_size=28, color=layer_colors[1]),
            Text("Then move one step farther", font_size=28, color=layer_colors[2]),
            Text("The wavefront keeps expanding", font_size=28, color=layer_colors[3]),
            Text("The final frontier closes the search", font_size=28, color=layer_colors[4]),
        ]
        for caption in captions:
            caption.to_edge(DOWN)

        self.play(FadeIn(title), Create(edge_group), LaggedStart(*[FadeIn(node) for node in node_group], lag_ratio=0.1), run_time=5)

        active_caption = None
        for depth in range(5):
            active_rings = VGroup(*[
                rings[name].copy().set_color(layer_colors[depth]).set_stroke(width=6)
                for name in layer_map[depth]
            ])
            if active_caption is None:
                self.play(LaggedStart(*[Create(ring) for ring in active_rings], lag_ratio=0.15), FadeIn(captions[depth]), run_time=3)
            else:
                self.play(LaggedStart(*[Create(ring) for ring in active_rings], lag_ratio=0.15), ReplacementTransform(active_caption, captions[depth]), run_time=3)
            active_caption = captions[depth]
            self.wait(1)

        frontier_box = SurroundingRectangle(VGroup(*[node_group[-1]]), color=RED_D, buff=0.18)
        self.play(Create(frontier_box), run_time=2)
        self.wait(2)

from manim import *

class WaveInterferenceBuild(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        title = Text("Interference from Two Waves", font_size=40).to_edge(UP)
        top_axes = Axes(x_range=[0, 2 * PI, PI / 2], y_range=[-1.6, 1.6, 1], x_length=8, y_length=2.2, tips=False).shift(UP * 1.8)
        mid_axes = top_axes.copy().shift(DOWN * 2.2)
        bot_axes = top_axes.copy().shift(DOWN * 4.4)

        wave1 = top_axes.plot(lambda x: np.sin(x), color=BLUE)
        wave2 = mid_axes.plot(lambda x: 0.7 * np.sin(x + PI / 3), color=GREEN)
        total = bot_axes.plot(lambda x: np.sin(x) + 0.7 * np.sin(x + PI / 3), color=YELLOW)

        label1 = Text("Wave 1", font_size=24, color=BLUE).next_to(top_axes, LEFT)
        label2 = Text("Wave 2", font_size=24, color=GREEN).next_to(mid_axes, LEFT)
        label3 = Text("Sum", font_size=24, color=YELLOW).next_to(bot_axes, LEFT)

        x_sample = PI
        guides = VGroup(
            DashedLine(top_axes.c2p(x_sample, 0), top_axes.i2gp(x_sample, wave1), color=BLUE_D),
            DashedLine(mid_axes.c2p(x_sample, 0), mid_axes.i2gp(x_sample, wave2), color=GREEN_D),
            DashedLine(bot_axes.c2p(x_sample, 0), bot_axes.i2gp(x_sample, total), color=YELLOW_D),
        )
        sample_note = Text("At one x-position, the amplitudes add", font_size=28, color=GRAY_D).to_edge(DOWN)
        phase_note = MathTex(r"\sin(x) + 0.7\sin(x+\phi)", font_size=34).next_to(bot_axes, RIGHT)

        self.play(FadeIn(title), Create(top_axes), Create(mid_axes), Create(bot_axes), run_time=4)
        self.play(Create(wave1), FadeIn(label1), run_time=3)
        self.wait(1)
        self.play(Create(wave2), FadeIn(label2), run_time=3)
        self.wait(1)
        self.play(Create(total), FadeIn(label3), run_time=4)
        self.play(LaggedStart(*[Create(guide) for guide in guides], lag_ratio=0.15), FadeIn(sample_note), run_time=4)
        self.play(FadeIn(phase_note), run_time=2)
        self.wait(2)

from manim import *

class EnzymeCatalysisProfile(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        title = Text("Why Catalysts Speed Reactions", font_size=40).to_edge(UP)
        axes = Axes(
            x_range=[0, 10, 2],
            y_range=[0, 6, 1],
            x_length=8,
            y_length=4.5,
            axis_config={"include_numbers": False},
            tips=False,
        ).shift(DOWN * 0.2)
        axis_labels = VGroup(
            Text("reaction progress", font_size=24).next_to(axes, DOWN),
            Text("energy", font_size=24).rotate(PI / 2).next_to(axes, LEFT),
        )
        uncatalyzed = axes.plot(lambda x: 0.35 + 4.6 * np.exp(-((x - 4.4) ** 2) / 2.2) + 0.06 * x, color=RED_D)
        catalyzed = axes.plot(lambda x: 0.35 + 2.4 * np.exp(-((x - 4.8) ** 2) / 2.4) + 0.06 * x, color=GREEN_D)
        reactant = VGroup(Circle(radius=0.22, color=BLUE, fill_opacity=0.25), Circle(radius=0.22, color=BLUE, fill_opacity=0.25).shift(RIGHT * 0.45)).arrange(RIGHT, buff=0.1).shift(LEFT * 5.0 + DOWN * 1.8)
        product = VGroup(Circle(radius=0.22, color=PURPLE, fill_opacity=0.25), Circle(radius=0.22, color=PURPLE, fill_opacity=0.25).shift(UP * 0.35)).shift(RIGHT * 5.0 + DOWN * 1.8)
        arrow = Arrow(reactant.get_right(), product.get_left(), buff=0.25, color=GRAY_B)
        reactant_label = Text("reactants", font_size=22).next_to(reactant, DOWN)
        product_label = Text("products", font_size=22).next_to(product, DOWN)

        unc_peak = axes.c2p(4.4, 5.0)
        cat_peak = axes.c2p(4.8, 2.9)
        start_level = axes.c2p(1.0, 0.55)
        unc_barrier = DoubleArrow(start_level, unc_peak, color=RED_D, buff=0.0, stroke_width=5)
        cat_barrier = DoubleArrow(start_level + RIGHT * 0.5, cat_peak, color=GREEN_D, buff=0.0, stroke_width=5)
        unc_label = Text("uncatalyzed", font_size=24, color=RED_D).next_to(uncatalyzed, UP)
        cat_label = Text("catalyzed", font_size=24, color=GREEN_D).next_to(catalyzed, DOWN)
        barrier_note = Text("Lower activation energy means more successful crossings", font_size=28, color=GRAY_D).to_edge(DOWN)
        enzyme_box = RoundedRectangle(corner_radius=0.12, width=2.2, height=0.8, color=GREEN_D, fill_opacity=0.15).shift(DOWN * 2.9)
        enzyme_text = Text("enzyme offers an easier path", font_size=22, color=GREEN_D).move_to(enzyme_box)

        self.play(FadeIn(title), Create(axes), FadeIn(axis_labels), run_time=4)
        self.play(FadeIn(reactant), FadeIn(product), GrowArrow(arrow), FadeIn(reactant_label), FadeIn(product_label), run_time=4)
        self.play(Create(uncatalyzed), FadeIn(unc_label), run_time=5)
        self.wait(1)
        self.play(Create(unc_barrier), run_time=3)
        self.wait(1)
        self.play(Create(catalyzed), FadeIn(cat_label), run_time=5)
        self.play(Create(cat_barrier), run_time=3)
        self.play(FadeIn(enzyme_box), FadeIn(enzyme_text), run_time=3)
        self.play(FadeIn(barrier_note), run_time=3)
        self.wait(3)

from manim import *

class BackpropSignalFlow(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        title = Text("Backpropagation Through a Small Network", font_size=38).to_edge(UP)

        inputs = VGroup(*[Circle(radius=0.18, color=BLUE_D, fill_opacity=0.18) for _ in range(3)]).arrange(DOWN, buff=0.55).shift(LEFT * 4)
        hidden = VGroup(*[Circle(radius=0.18, color=TEAL_D, fill_opacity=0.18) for _ in range(4)]).arrange(DOWN, buff=0.5)
        outputs = VGroup(*[Circle(radius=0.18, color=PURPLE_D, fill_opacity=0.18) for _ in range(2)]).arrange(DOWN, buff=0.8).shift(RIGHT * 4)
        hidden.move_to(ORIGIN)
        input_labels = VGroup(*[Text(label, font_size=22).next_to(node, LEFT) for label, node in zip(["x1", "x2", "x3"], inputs)])
        output_labels = VGroup(*[Text(label, font_size=22).next_to(node, RIGHT) for label, node in zip(["y1", "y2"], outputs)])

        forward_1 = VGroup(*[Arrow(inp.get_right(), hid.get_left(), buff=0.08, stroke_width=2.5, color=GRAY_B) for inp in inputs for hid in hidden])
        forward_2 = VGroup(*[Arrow(hid.get_right(), out.get_left(), buff=0.08, stroke_width=2.5, color=GRAY_B) for hid in hidden for out in outputs])
        loss_box = RoundedRectangle(corner_radius=0.1, width=1.4, height=0.7, color=RED_D, fill_opacity=0.14).next_to(outputs, RIGHT, buff=1.0)
        loss_label = Text("loss", font_size=26, color=RED_D).move_to(loss_box)
        loss_arrows = VGroup(*[Arrow(out.get_right(), loss_box.get_left(), buff=0.08, stroke_width=3, color=RED_D) for out in outputs])

        backward_2 = VGroup(*[Arrow(out.get_left(), hid.get_right(), buff=0.08, stroke_width=3, color=ORANGE, max_tip_length_to_length_ratio=0.2) for out in outputs for hid in hidden])
        backward_1 = VGroup(*[Arrow(hid.get_left(), inp.get_right(), buff=0.08, stroke_width=3, color=YELLOW_D, max_tip_length_to_length_ratio=0.2) for hid in hidden for inp in inputs])
        update_panel = VGroup(
            RoundedRectangle(corner_radius=0.1, width=3.2, height=1.0, color=GREEN_D, fill_opacity=0.12),
            Text("weights shift opposite the gradient", font_size=24, color=GREEN_D),
        ).arrange(DOWN, buff=0.18).to_edge(DOWN)

        forward_caption = Text("Forward pass builds predictions", font_size=28, color=GRAY_D).to_edge(DOWN)
        loss_caption = Text("The loss compares prediction and target", font_size=28, color=RED_D).to_edge(DOWN)
        backward_caption = Text("Gradients flow backward to assign credit and blame", font_size=28, color=ORANGE).to_edge(DOWN)

        self.play(FadeIn(title), LaggedStart(*[FadeIn(node) for node in inputs], lag_ratio=0.1), LaggedStart(*[FadeIn(node) for node in hidden], lag_ratio=0.08), LaggedStart(*[FadeIn(node) for node in outputs], lag_ratio=0.12), FadeIn(input_labels), FadeIn(output_labels), run_time=5)
        self.play(LaggedStart(*[GrowArrow(arrow) for arrow in forward_1], lag_ratio=0.04), run_time=4)
        self.play(LaggedStart(*[GrowArrow(arrow) for arrow in forward_2], lag_ratio=0.05), FadeIn(forward_caption), run_time=4)
        self.wait(1)
        self.play(FadeIn(loss_box), FadeIn(loss_label), LaggedStart(*[GrowArrow(arrow) for arrow in loss_arrows], lag_ratio=0.15), ReplacementTransform(forward_caption, loss_caption), run_time=4)
        self.wait(1)
        self.play(LaggedStart(*[GrowArrow(arrow) for arrow in backward_2], lag_ratio=0.03), run_time=5)
        self.play(LaggedStart(*[GrowArrow(arrow) for arrow in backward_1], lag_ratio=0.03), ReplacementTransform(loss_caption, backward_caption), run_time=5)
        self.play(FadeIn(update_panel), run_time=3)
        self.wait(3)

from manim import *

class CameraSecantToTangent(MovingCameraScene):
    def construct(self):
        def curve(x):
            return 0.09 * (x - 1.5) * (x - 4.8) * (x - 6.3) + 2.2

        title = Text("From Secant Slope to Tangent Slope", font_size=38).to_edge(UP)
        axes = Axes(
            x_range=[0, 7, 1],
            y_range=[0, 4, 1],
            x_length=9,
            y_length=4.8,
            tips=False,
        ).shift(DOWN * 0.35)
        labels = axes.get_axis_labels(Text("x", font_size=24), Text("f(x)", font_size=24))
        graph = axes.plot(curve, x_range=[0.2, 6.8], color=BLUE_D)
        x_tracker = ValueTracker(1.8)
        dx_tracker = ValueTracker(1.25)

        point = always_redraw(lambda: Dot(axes.c2p(x_tracker.get_value(), curve(x_tracker.get_value())), color=YELLOW))
        secant = always_redraw(
            lambda: axes.get_secant_slope_group(
                x=x_tracker.get_value(),
                graph=graph,
                dx=dx_tracker.get_value(),
                secant_line_length=4.5,
                secant_line_color=YELLOW_D,
                dx_line_color=BLUE_B,
                dy_line_color=GREEN_D,
            )
        )
        dx_readout = always_redraw(
            lambda: VGroup(
                Text("current dx", font_size=24, color=GRAY_D),
                DecimalNumber(dx_tracker.get_value(), num_decimal_places=2, font_size=28, color=YELLOW_D),
            ).arrange(RIGHT, buff=0.18).to_corner(UR).shift(DOWN * 0.6)
        )
        caption_a = Text("A secant uses two nearby sample points", font_size=28, color=GRAY_D).to_edge(DOWN)
        caption_b = Text("As dx shrinks, the secant approaches the tangent", font_size=28, color=GRAY_D).to_edge(DOWN)
        caption_c = Text("The same local idea works anywhere on the curve", font_size=28, color=GRAY_D).to_edge(DOWN)

        self.play(FadeIn(title), Create(axes), FadeIn(labels), Create(graph), run_time=4)
        self.play(FadeIn(point), Create(secant), FadeIn(caption_a), run_time=4)
        self.wait(1)
        self.play(self.camera.frame.animate.scale(0.6).move_to(point.get_center()), FadeIn(dx_readout), run_time=4)
        self.play(dx_tracker.animate.set_value(0.35), ReplacementTransform(caption_a, caption_b), run_time=5)
        self.play(x_tracker.animate.set_value(4.3), self.camera.frame.animate.move_to(axes.c2p(4.3, curve(4.3))), run_time=5)
        self.play(dx_tracker.animate.set_value(0.08), ReplacementTransform(caption_b, caption_c), run_time=5)
        self.wait(2)

from manim import *

class VectorFieldProbeWalkthrough(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        def field_fn(point):
            return np.array([0.8 - 0.25 * point[1], 0.35 * point[0], 0.0])

        def scaled_tip(point, scale=0.85):
            vector = field_fn(point)
            norm = max(np.linalg.norm(vector), 1e-6)
            return point + scale * vector / norm

        title = Text("Reading Motion from a Vector Field", font_size=38).to_edge(UP)
        plane = NumberPlane(x_range=[-5, 5, 1], y_range=[-3, 3, 1], background_line_style={"stroke_opacity": 0.35}).shift(DOWN * 0.2)
        field = ArrowVectorField(field_fn, x_range=[-5, 5, 1], y_range=[-3, 3, 1], colors=[BLUE_E, TEAL_D, YELLOW_D], length_func=lambda norm: 0.18 + 0.16 * min(norm, 2.4))

        sample_points = [plane.c2p(-2.5, 1.4), plane.c2p(0.2, 0.3), plane.c2p(2.6, -1.3)]
        samples = VGroup(*[Dot(point, color=TEAL_A, radius=0.06) for point in sample_points])
        sample_arrows = VGroup(*[
            Arrow(point, scaled_tip(point, scale=0.7), buff=0.0, color=TEAL_D, stroke_width=5, max_tip_length_to_length_ratio=0.22)
            for point in sample_points
        ])

        probe = Dot(plane.c2p(-3.4, -1.6), color=YELLOW, radius=0.08)
        local_arrow = always_redraw(
            lambda: Arrow(
                probe.get_center(),
                scaled_tip(probe.get_center()),
                buff=0.0,
                color=YELLOW_D,
                stroke_width=6,
                max_tip_length_to_length_ratio=0.22,
            )
        )
        traced_path = TracedPath(probe.get_center, stroke_color=YELLOW, stroke_width=4)
        guide_path = VMobject(color=YELLOW_D)
        guide_path.set_points_smoothly([
            plane.c2p(-3.4, -1.6),
            plane.c2p(-1.7, -0.2),
            plane.c2p(0.3, 1.2),
            plane.c2p(2.4, 1.0),
            plane.c2p(3.5, -0.4),
        ])

        caption_a = Text("Each arrow says which direction motion wants to go", font_size=27, color=GRAY_D).to_edge(DOWN)
        caption_b = Text("A single probe samples the field locally as it moves", font_size=27, color=GRAY_D).to_edge(DOWN)
        caption_c = Text("The traced path reveals the flow pattern over time", font_size=27, color=GRAY_D).to_edge(DOWN)

        self.play(FadeIn(title), Create(plane), run_time=3)
        self.play(FadeIn(field), run_time=4)
        self.play(LaggedStart(*[FadeIn(sample) for sample in samples], lag_ratio=0.15), LaggedStart(*[GrowArrow(arrow) for arrow in sample_arrows], lag_ratio=0.12), FadeIn(caption_a), run_time=4)
        self.wait(1)
        self.play(FadeIn(probe), FadeIn(local_arrow), Create(traced_path), ReplacementTransform(caption_a, caption_b), run_time=3)
        self.play(MoveAlongPath(probe, guide_path), rate_func=linear, run_time=10)
        self.play(ReplacementTransform(caption_b, caption_c), run_time=2)
        self.wait(2)

from manim import *

class SurfaceOrbitWalkthrough(ThreeDScene):
    def construct(self):
        def height(u, v):
            return 0.35 * np.sin(u) * np.cos(v) + 0.08 * u

        title = Text("A Surface Has Height in Every Direction", font_size=36).to_edge(UP)
        caption_a = Text("The surface maps every (x, y) location to a height", font_size=26, color=GRAY_D).to_edge(DOWN)
        caption_b = Text("A ridge curve shows one slice through that height field", font_size=26, color=GRAY_D).to_edge(DOWN)
        caption_c = Text("Camera motion makes the shape easier to read", font_size=26, color=GRAY_D).to_edge(DOWN)
        self.add_fixed_in_frame_mobjects(title, caption_a, caption_b, caption_c)
        caption_b.set_opacity(0)
        caption_c.set_opacity(0)

        axes = ThreeDAxes(x_range=[-3, 3, 1], y_range=[-3, 3, 1], z_range=[-2, 2, 1], x_length=7, y_length=7, z_length=4.5)
        surface = Surface(
            lambda u, v: axes.c2p(u, v, height(u, v)),
            u_range=[-3, 3],
            v_range=[-3, 3],
            resolution=(18, 18),
            checkerboard_colors=[BLUE_D, TEAL_D],
            fill_opacity=0.65,
        )
        ridge = ParametricFunction(lambda t: axes.c2p(t, 0.6, height(t, 0.6)), t_range=[-3, 3], color=YELLOW_D)
        probe = Dot3D(axes.c2p(-3, 0.6, height(-3, 0.6)), color=RED_D, radius=0.07)
        ridge_label = Text("ridge slice", font_size=22, color=YELLOW_D).next_to(title, DOWN, buff=0.3)
        self.add_fixed_in_frame_mobjects(ridge_label)
        ridge_label.set_opacity(0)

        self.set_camera_orientation(phi=65 * DEGREES, theta=-55 * DEGREES)
        self.play(FadeIn(title), Create(axes), FadeIn(caption_a), run_time=4)
        self.play(Create(surface), run_time=5)
        self.play(Create(ridge), FadeIn(ridge_label), FadeOut(caption_a), FadeIn(caption_b), run_time=4)
        self.play(FadeIn(probe), run_time=2)
        self.begin_ambient_camera_rotation(rate=0.12)
        self.play(MoveAlongPath(probe, ridge), FadeOut(caption_b), FadeIn(caption_c), run_time=8, rate_func=linear)
        self.wait(3)
        self.stop_ambient_camera_rotation()

prompt: Create a 30-second Manim explainer that combines a moving point, a tangent-style line, and shaded accumulation on the same graph. Use trackers and live redraws so the story evolves through multiple beats instead of one static figure.

from manim import *

class TrackerTangentAreaStory(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        def curve(x):
            return 0.08 * (x - 1.2) * (x - 4.8) * (x - 6.1) + 2.4

        def tangent_segment(x_value, width=1.2):
            slope = (curve(x_value + 0.02) - curve(x_value - 0.02)) / 0.04
            center = axes.c2p(x_value, curve(x_value))
            dx = width / (2 * np.sqrt(1 + slope**2))
            dy = slope * dx
            return Line(center + np.array([-dx, -dy, 0]), center + np.array([dx, dy, 0]), color=YELLOW_D, stroke_width=6)

        title = Text("A Moving Point Tells Two Stories", font_size=36).to_edge(UP)
        axes = Axes(x_range=[0, 7, 1], y_range=[0, 4.5, 1], x_length=8.8, y_length=4.8, tips=False).shift(DOWN * 0.3)
        graph = axes.plot(curve, x_range=[0.2, 6.8], color=BLUE_D)
        x_tracker = ValueTracker(1.2)
        probe = always_redraw(lambda: Dot(axes.c2p(x_tracker.get_value(), curve(x_tracker.get_value())), color=YELLOW, radius=0.08))
        guide = always_redraw(lambda: DashedLine(axes.c2p(x_tracker.get_value(), 0), probe.get_center(), color=GRAY_B, stroke_width=3))
        tangent = always_redraw(lambda: tangent_segment(x_tracker.get_value()))
        area = always_redraw(lambda: axes.get_area(graph, x_range=(0.4, x_tracker.get_value()), color=TEAL_D, opacity=0.22))
        readout = always_redraw(lambda: VGroup(Text("x", font_size=24, color=GRAY_D), DecimalNumber(x_tracker.get_value(), num_decimal_places=2, font_size=28, color=YELLOW_D)).arrange(RIGHT, buff=0.15).to_corner(UR).shift(DOWN * 0.6))
        caption_a = Text("The point moves, the local slope rotates, and the accumulated area grows.", font_size=25, color=GRAY_D).to_edge(DOWN)
        caption_b = Text("One graph can support local and global reasoning at the same time.", font_size=25, color=GRAY_D).to_edge(DOWN)

        self.play(FadeIn(title), Create(axes), Create(graph), run_time=4)
        self.play(FadeIn(area), FadeIn(probe), Create(guide), Create(tangent), FadeIn(readout), FadeIn(caption_a), run_time=4)
        self.play(x_tracker.animate.set_value(2.6), run_time=5)
        self.play(x_tracker.animate.set_value(4.4), run_time=5)
        self.play(ReplacementTransform(caption_a, caption_b), x_tracker.animate.set_value(5.9), run_time=5)
        self.wait(2)

from manim import *

class TitrationTableTrackerStory(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        title = Text("Reading a Titration Curve in Stages", font_size=36).to_edge(UP)
        axes = Axes(x_range=[0, 10, 1], y_range=[0, 14, 2], x_length=7.2, y_length=4.6, tips=False).shift(LEFT * 1.7 + DOWN * 0.2)
        curve = axes.plot(lambda x: 7 + 3.1 * np.tanh((x - 5.0) * 1.2) + 0.12 * (x - 5.0), x_range=[0.6, 9.4], color=BLUE_D)
        tracker = ValueTracker(2.0)
        probe = always_redraw(lambda: Dot(axes.i2gp(tracker.get_value(), curve), color=YELLOW, radius=0.08))
        probe_line = always_redraw(lambda: DashedLine(axes.c2p(tracker.get_value(), 0), probe.get_center(), color=YELLOW_D, stroke_width=3))
        eq_line = DashedLine(axes.c2p(5, 0), axes.c2p(5, 14), color=RED_D, stroke_width=4)
        eq_label = Text("equivalence", font_size=22, color=RED_D).next_to(eq_line, UP)
        table = MathTable([["region", "shape"], ["acidic", "slow rise"], ["transition", "steep jump"], ["basic", "plateau"]], include_outer_lines=True).scale(0.42).to_edge(RIGHT).shift(DOWN * 0.2)
        row_a = SurroundingRectangle(table.get_rows()[1], color=BLUE_D, buff=0.05)
        row_b = SurroundingRectangle(table.get_rows()[2], color=YELLOW_D, buff=0.05)
        row_c = SurroundingRectangle(table.get_rows()[3], color=GREEN_D, buff=0.05)
        caption_a = Text("Early on, the pH moves slowly while acid still dominates.", font_size=24, color=GRAY_D).to_edge(DOWN)
        caption_b = Text("Near equivalence, a small volume change produces a large pH jump.", font_size=24, color=GRAY_D).to_edge(DOWN)
        caption_c = Text("After the jump, extra base keeps the curve on its upper plateau.", font_size=24, color=GRAY_D).to_edge(DOWN)

        self.play(FadeIn(title), Create(axes), Create(curve), FadeIn(table), run_time=4)
        self.play(FadeIn(probe), Create(probe_line), Create(row_a), FadeIn(caption_a), run_time=4)
        self.play(tracker.animate.set_value(4.7), run_time=5)
        self.play(Create(eq_line), FadeIn(eq_label), ReplacementTransform(row_a, row_b), ReplacementTransform(caption_a, caption_b), run_time=5)
        self.play(tracker.animate.set_value(5.4), run_time=4)
        self.play(tracker.animate.set_value(8.5), ReplacementTransform(row_b, row_c), ReplacementTransform(caption_b, caption_c), run_time=5)
        self.wait(2)

from manim import *

class CircularProjectionStory(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        title = Text("Circular Motion Creates a Projected Wave", font_size=36).to_edge(UP)
        orbit = Circle(radius=1.35, color=BLUE_D).shift(LEFT * 3.3)
        center = Dot(orbit.get_center(), color=GRAY_B, radius=0.05)
        theta = ValueTracker(0.0)
        moving_dot = always_redraw(lambda: Dot(orbit.point_at_angle(theta.get_value()), color=YELLOW, radius=0.08))
        projection_target = always_redraw(lambda: Dot(RIGHT * 1.2 + UP * np.sin(theta.get_value()) * 1.35, color=TEAL_D, radius=0.07))
        projection_line = always_redraw(lambda: DashedLine(moving_dot.get_center(), np.array([projection_target.get_center()[0], moving_dot.get_center()[1], 0]), color=GRAY_C, stroke_width=3))
        bridge_line = always_redraw(lambda: DashedLine(np.array([projection_target.get_center()[0], moving_dot.get_center()[1], 0]), projection_target.get_center(), color=TEAL_D, stroke_width=3))
        axes = Axes(x_range=[0, 7, 1], y_range=[-1.6, 1.6, 0.5], x_length=5.6, y_length=3.0, tips=False).shift(RIGHT * 3.1)
        wave_trace = TracedPath(projection_target.get_center, stroke_color=TEAL_D, stroke_width=4)
        radial_line = always_redraw(lambda: Line(orbit.get_center(), moving_dot.get_center(), color=YELLOW_D, stroke_width=5))
        label_circle = Text("rotation", font_size=22, color=BLUE_D).next_to(orbit, DOWN)
        label_wave = Text("projection", font_size=22, color=TEAL_D).next_to(axes, DOWN)
        caption_a = Text("The rotating point carries a vertical projection height.", font_size=24, color=GRAY_D).to_edge(DOWN)
        caption_b = Text("Tracing that height over time turns circular motion into a wave.", font_size=24, color=GRAY_D).to_edge(DOWN)

        self.add(wave_trace)
        self.play(FadeIn(title), Create(orbit), FadeIn(center), Create(axes), FadeIn(label_circle), FadeIn(label_wave), run_time=4)
        self.play(FadeIn(moving_dot), Create(radial_line), Create(projection_line), Create(bridge_line), FadeIn(projection_target), FadeIn(caption_a), run_time=4)
        self.play(theta.animate.set_value(TAU), run_time=8, rate_func=linear)
        self.play(ReplacementTransform(caption_a, caption_b), theta.animate.set_value(2 * TAU), run_time=8, rate_func=linear)
        self.wait(2)

from manim import *

class CameraLossLandscapeTableStory(MovingCameraScene):
    def construct(self):
        def loss_fn(x):
            return 0.12 * (x - 1.1) ** 2 + 0.45 * np.exp(-((x - 1.1) ** 2) / 1.8) + 0.55

        def tangent_line(x_value, width=0.9):
            slope = (loss_fn(x_value + 0.03) - loss_fn(x_value - 0.03)) / 0.06
            center = axes.c2p(x_value, loss_fn(x_value))
            dx = width / (2 * np.sqrt(1 + slope**2))
            dy = slope * dx
            return Line(center + np.array([-dx, -dy, 0]), center + np.array([dx, dy, 0]), color=YELLOW_D, stroke_width=5)

        title = Text("Optimization as a Descent Story", font_size=36).to_edge(UP)
        axes = Axes(x_range=[-2, 4, 1], y_range=[0, 2.2, 0.5], x_length=8.4, y_length=4.8, tips=False).shift(DOWN * 0.25)
        graph = axes.plot(loss_fn, x_range=[-1.8, 3.8], color=BLUE_D)
        x_tracker = ValueTracker(3.0)
        probe = always_redraw(lambda: Dot(axes.c2p(x_tracker.get_value(), loss_fn(x_tracker.get_value())), color=YELLOW, radius=0.08))
        guide = always_redraw(lambda: DashedLine(axes.c2p(x_tracker.get_value(), 0), probe.get_center(), color=GRAY_C, stroke_width=3))
        tangent = always_redraw(lambda: tangent_line(x_tracker.get_value()))
        readout = always_redraw(lambda: VGroup(Text("loss", font_size=24, color=GRAY_D), DecimalNumber(loss_fn(x_tracker.get_value()), num_decimal_places=2, font_size=28, color=YELLOW_D)).arrange(RIGHT, buff=0.15).to_corner(UR).shift(DOWN * 0.6))
        table = MathTable([["phase", "signal"], ["start", "large slope"], ["middle", "steady drop"], ["end", "small updates"]], include_outer_lines=True).scale(0.42).to_edge(RIGHT).shift(DOWN * 0.25)
        row_start = SurroundingRectangle(table.get_rows()[1], color=RED_D, buff=0.05)
        row_mid = SurroundingRectangle(table.get_rows()[2], color=YELLOW_D, buff=0.05)
        row_end = SurroundingRectangle(table.get_rows()[3], color=GREEN_D, buff=0.05)
        caption_a = Text("Far from the minimum, the local slope points strongly downhill.", font_size=24, color=GRAY_D).to_edge(DOWN)
        caption_b = Text("As the point approaches the basin, the camera can zoom to smaller changes.", font_size=24, color=GRAY_D).to_edge(DOWN)
        caption_c = Text("Near the minimum, updates get smaller and the curve flattens out.", font_size=24, color=GRAY_D).to_edge(DOWN)

        self.play(FadeIn(title), Create(axes), Create(graph), FadeIn(table), run_time=4)
        self.play(FadeIn(probe), Create(guide), Create(tangent), FadeIn(readout), Create(row_start), FadeIn(caption_a), run_time=4)
        self.play(self.camera.frame.animate.scale(0.65).move_to(probe.get_center()), x_tracker.animate.set_value(1.9), run_time=5)
        self.play(ReplacementTransform(row_start, row_mid), ReplacementTransform(caption_a, caption_b), x_tracker.animate.set_value(1.25), run_time=5)
        self.play(self.camera.frame.animate.scale(0.7).move_to(probe.get_center()), x_tracker.animate.set_value(1.05), run_time=4)
        self.play(ReplacementTransform(row_mid, row_end), ReplacementTransform(caption_b, caption_c), x_tracker.animate.set_value(0.98), run_time=4)
        self.wait(2)

from manim import *

class SurfaceSliceDashboardStory(ThreeDScene):
    def construct(self):
        def z_height(u, v):
            return 0.25 * u * np.exp(-(u**2 + v**2) / 8) + 0.45 * np.sin(v) * np.cos(u / 2)

        title = Text("A Surface and Its Informative Slices", font_size=34).to_edge(UP)
        dashboard = MathTable([["view", "meaning"], ["surface", "all x,y pairs"], ["yellow slice", "vary x at fixed y"], ["red slice", "vary y at fixed x"]], include_outer_lines=True).scale(0.38).to_corner(UR).shift(DOWN * 0.6)
        caption_a = Text("The surface gives one height for every point in the plane.", font_size=24, color=GRAY_D).to_edge(DOWN)
        caption_b = Text("Slice curves reduce the surface to simpler one-dimensional stories.", font_size=24, color=GRAY_D).to_edge(DOWN)
        caption_c = Text("A moving probe makes the slope changes easier to read in 3D.", font_size=24, color=GRAY_D).to_edge(DOWN)
        self.add_fixed_in_frame_mobjects(title, dashboard, caption_a)
        self.add_fixed_in_frame_mobjects(caption_b, caption_c)
        caption_b.set_opacity(0)
        caption_c.set_opacity(0)

        axes = ThreeDAxes(x_range=[-3, 3, 1], y_range=[-3, 3, 1], z_range=[-2, 2, 1], x_length=7, y_length=7, z_length=4.5)
        surface = Surface(lambda u, v: axes.c2p(u, v, z_height(u, v)), u_range=[-3, 3], v_range=[-3, 3], resolution=(20, 20), checkerboard_colors=[BLUE_D, TEAL_D], fill_opacity=0.68)
        x_slice = ParametricFunction(lambda t: axes.c2p(t, 1.2, z_height(t, 1.2)), t_range=[-3, 3], color=YELLOW_D)
        y_slice = ParametricFunction(lambda t: axes.c2p(-0.8, t, z_height(-0.8, t)), t_range=[-3, 3], color=RED_D)
        probe = Dot3D(axes.c2p(-3, 1.2, z_height(-3, 1.2)), color=YELLOW, radius=0.07)

        self.set_camera_orientation(phi=65 * DEGREES, theta=-55 * DEGREES)
        self.play(FadeIn(title), FadeIn(dashboard), Create(axes), FadeIn(caption_a), run_time=4)
        self.play(Create(surface), run_time=5)
        self.play(Create(x_slice), FadeOut(caption_a), FadeIn(caption_b), run_time=4)
        self.play(Create(y_slice), run_time=3)
        self.play(FadeIn(probe), FadeOut(caption_b), FadeIn(caption_c), run_time=2)
        self.begin_ambient_camera_rotation(rate=0.14)
        self.play(MoveAlongPath(probe, x_slice), run_time=7, rate_func=linear)
        self.wait(3)
        self.stop_ambient_camera_rotation()
